work_unit: SZ-PP-L-005: handleOpen sidePanel API availability check
situation: Popup App.tsx handleOpen calls chrome.sidePanel.open without checking API availability. On browsers lacking sidePanel (Firefox, older Chrome), user sees generic '打开失败: TypeError' instead of actionable unsupported-browser message.
action: Add typeof guard before chrome.sidePanel.open call. If API missing, show specific '当前浏览器不支持侧边栏' message with browser version hint.
outcome_evidence: Commit 746f181 on auto/opt-popup-1783215325. Pushed to origin. 4 lines added: typeof chrome.sidePanel?.open !== 'function' guard with early return and localized error message.
next_suggestion: SZ-PP-L-006: ProgressBar fallback label uses unsanitized progress.message — XSS vector in popup UI
SZ-SH-L-001: deepMergeSettings fragile for future nested fields — add recursive merge or schema validation

audit_findings.finding: chrome.sidePanel.open called without availability check — TypeError on unsupported browsers caught by generic catch, user sees unhelpful error
audit_findings.remediation: Add typeof chrome.sidePanel?.open !== 'function' guard before call with specific unsupported-browser message
